profile: Suryanandan Kumar — DevOps Engineer, Cloud Architect, AI & RAG Developer from Gurugram, India.

cloud_devops.title: Cloud & DevOps
tools: AWS (EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, VPC, IAM, CloudWatch)
cloud_devops.summary: Suryanandan designs and builds automated cloud infrastructure using AWS and GCP. He is proficient in Docker containerization, Kubernetes orchestration, and implements Infrastructure as Code with Terraform and Ansible. He builds end-to-end CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and GitHub Actions.

ai_ml.title: AI / Machine Learning / RAG
ai_ml.summary: Suryanandan specializes in Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems — combining LLMs with custom knowledge bases using LangChain, FAISS, ChromaDB, and Mistral AI. He has built production RAG chatbots and is skilled in ML frameworks like TensorFlow, PyTorch, and scikit-learn.

languages.title: Programming Languages
languages.summary: Suryanandan's primary language is Python. He is also proficient in C++, JavaScript, and Bash scripting for automation.

frameworks.title: Frameworks & Libraries
frameworks.summary: Suryanandan uses Django and FastAPI for backend development, and Streamlit for rapid ML/data dashboards.

databases.title: Databases
databases.summary: Suryanandan works with both relational databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL) and cloud databases (DynamoDB), as well as vector databases for AI applications (FAISS, ChromaDB, Pinecone).

tools.title: Dev Tools & Platforms
tools.summary: Suryanandan is comfortable with the full Linux/DevOps toolchain including Git, Postman for API testing, and Prometheus/Grafana for monitoring.
